Program Highlights

This Is What We Do 🌟

Every session, every drill, every goal — this is what access looks like in action across Los Angeles.

Skills Training

Building Fundamentals

Ball control and spatial awareness built through structured drills — skills that carry well beyond soccer.

Team Play

Competing Together

Small-sided games where kids learn to communicate, trust teammates, and handle winning and losing with grace.

Game Day

First Goals, First Wins

The moment a child scores their first goal — that confidence lives far beyond the pitch.

The Bigger Picture

More Than a Game

Soccer is the vehicle. What we're really building is confidence — the kind that shows up in classrooms, in friendships, and in the way a child carries themselves.

Every session, every coach-player relationship, every piece of gear we hand to a kid who's never owned cleats — it all adds up to something that lasts.

Support the Mission

"Soccer is the vehicle. Confidence, belonging, and growth are the mission."

— GB United Foundation

Support Our Mission ⚽

Equitable access to soccer for every kid in Los Angeles.
